title: babl, gegl04, gimp, and libgexiv2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
babl
[0.1.114-1]
- rebase to the latest upstream (RHEL-88142)

[0.1.112-1]
- rebase to the latest upstream (RHEL-88142)

gegl04
[0.4.62-1]
- New upstream release 0.4.62 (RHEL-88143)

[0.4.58-1]
- New upstream release 0.4.58 (RHEL-88143)

gimp
[2:3.0.4-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.4 stable version and exclude s390x arch (RHEL-40106)

[2:3.0.2-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.2 stable version (RHEL-40106)

libgexiv2
[0.14.3-1]
- Rebase to the latest upstream 0.14.3 (RHEL-88597)
